activated_rules.rule_name: Consignor Identification via Concise Text in Invoice
Goods Description Verification Prioritizing Article Numbers
China / Hong Kong Equivalence for Country

consignor.certificate_value:
Campanello & Co AB
Kungsporten 4a
Tel. +46 31 21 91 04
info@camab.se
SE-427 50 , Billdal
Sweden
consignor.invoice_value:
Campanello & Co AB
Kungsporten 4a
SE-427 50 Billdal
Sweden
Tel. +46 31 21 91 04
info@camab.se
consignor.motivation: Consignor 'Campanello & Co AB' from Sweden in the certificate matches the invoice seller including name and country after normalization (case, spacing, and company suffix). The consignor appears explicitly in the invoice header and address blocks on all pages, satisfying 4.1.0 and 4.1.4 rules.

consignee.certificate_value:
Mohammed A Ali Bin Mahfouz Trading 
Est. 6276 Khalid LBN Al-Waleed Ash
Sharafiyah District,
Jeddah
Kingdom of Saudi Arabia
consignee.invoice_value:
Mohammed A Ali Bin Mahfouz Trading Est.
6276 Khalid LBN Al-Waleed Ash
Sharafiyah District, Jeddah
Kingdom of Saudi Arabia
consignee.motivation: The consignee name in the certificate matches the buyer field in the invoice after normalization. The country 'Kingdom of Saudi Arabia' matches exactly. The consignee is identified in the primary invoicing field as required by 4.2.0.2 and 4.2.3.

goods_description.motivation: The goods description 'SWEDISH WHITEWOOD' in the certificate is explicitly identified in the invoice description fields. The product appears as 'SWEDISH WHITEWOOD' and 'WHITEWOOD 25x100' in the invoice. No article numbers to verify, but exact text match with allowed normalizations applies.

quantity.motivation: Quantity '97,464 CBM' in certificate and invoice volume '97,464 m³' match after normalization and allowed removal of thousands separator. Units are consistent and numeric values identical within allowed normalization.

origin.motivation: Origin in certificate is 'EU, SWEDEN'. Invoice explicitly states 'SWEDEN' as origin in the origin field. The EU membership normalization is applied allowing 'EU' in certificate to match 'SWEDEN' in invoice. All certificate origin countries are identified in invoice as required.

overall_assessment.decision_summary: All certificate control points match the corresponding invoice data with explicit identification and allowed normalizations. No discrepancies found in consignor, consignee, goods description, quantity or origin.
overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla kontrollpunkter i certifikatet kan verifieras i fakturan utan avvikelser eller osäkerheter. Dokumenten är överensstämmande och kan godkännas automatiskt.
